nasb.text: and they shall put it and all its utensils in a covering of porpoise skin, and shall put it on the carrying bars.

esv.text: And they shall put it with all its utensils in a covering of goatskin and put it on the carrying frame.

cnv.text: 他們又要把燈臺和燈臺的一切器具，都包在海狗皮裡，然後放在抬架上。

ccb.text: 再在上面盖上海狗皮，然后放在抬架上。
